Detailed Description: Current Credit Line Amount - For lines of credit, report the total credit line currently available to the borrower. Leave blank for home equity loans.

Report the status of borrower payments (Current, 30, 60, 90 etc.) of the loan. Indicators of Foreclosure, Bankruptcy and REO also carried in this line item. T=Terminated Reporting for loans missing from current month but not paid off or liquidated. If liquidated by short sale or third party foreclosure sale, report "0".
Allowed Values: C = Current; 3 = 30 days; 6 = 60 days; 9 = 90+ days; F = FC; R = REO; T = Terminated Reporting; S = Servicing Sold Release; 0 = Paid off; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Foreclosure Referral Date - Report the date that the loan was referred to an attorney for the purpose of initiating foreclosure proceedings. Should reflect the referral date of currently active foreclosure process. Loans cured from foreclosure should not have a referral date.

Report the date that the foreclosure sale occurs on the subject property. Typically the end of the foreclosure process unless right of redemption applies. If loan is not in foreclosure, leave blank (null). Populate for any loan that has completed foreclosure sale.
Pre-Payment Penalty Flag - Report whether the loan carries a penalty if the borrower prepays the loan during a specified period of time.
Pre-Payment Penalty Term (In Months) - Report the time period from loan origination that a prepayment penalty applies. This is an origination line item and should not change with the reporting month.
Allowed Values: Whole number in months. e.g., 36 for 36 months (3 years).

Detailed Description: Retired March 2013

Foreclosure Status - Report the current foreclosure status as of the end of the reporting month. In foreclosure pre-sale = referred to attorney but not yet at sale. Post-sale foreclosure = title obtained but property not yet marketed (if unavailable, code as REO). In the month the loan liquidates, code as '2'. REO = title obtained and property on market.
Allowed Values: 0 = Not in foreclosure; 1 = In foreclosure, pre-sale; 2 = Post-sale foreclosure, Redemption, non-REO (if available, otherwise REO); 3 = REO

Detailed Description: Liquidation Status - Provide the liquidation method for any loan liquidated during the reporting month. Not Paid In Full = outstanding balance or active line of credit. Voluntary Payoff = paid in full by borrower. Involuntary Liquidation = foreclosure, short-sales, charge-offs, REO liquidations. Servicing Transfer = servicing transferred or sold.
Allowed Values: 0 = Not paid-in-full; 1 = Voluntary payoff; 2 = Involuntary liquidation (foreclosure); 3 = Servicing transfer

Detailed Description: Troubled Debt Restructure - Report the date designating when the loan was classified as a TDR as defined in the FR Y-9C Glossary. Reportable for the duration of TDR designation; discontinue when no longer designated.
Retired March 2020
Retired September 2022
Interest Rate Frozen - Report on all loans where a floating interest rate was frozen at a fixed rate. If the loan was adjustable and converted to fixed during modification, code "Y"; otherwise "N".
Principal Deferred - Report on any loans where principal payment or amortization has been deferred to a later date during modification process. Code "Y" if deferred; otherwise "N".
Report in field 60 whether any loans are accounted for as purchased-credit deteriorated. If the loan is a PCD loan, code "Y"; otherwise "N". Note: None of the records should be left blank.

Workout Type Completed / Executed - Report the type of loss mitigation activity successfully completed in the current month. Code only in the month completed. If efforts ongoing, leave blank. If never in loss mitigation, leave blank. If efforts fail, report 0 and Loss Mitigation Status=3 (Broken).
Allowed Values: 0 = No Workout Plan Performed; 1 = Modification; 2 = Payment Plan; 3 = Deed in Lieu; 4 = Short Sale; 5 = Stipulated Repayment / stip to mod (Retired); 6 = Do not Use; 7 = Settlement; 8 = Other; 9 = Forbearance Plan; 16 = Refinance; 17 = Partial Claim/Junior Lien

Detailed Description: First Mortgage Serviced In House - Report any instance where the first mortgage associated with the home equity loan/line is serviced by your bank. Leave blank for any first lien home equities.
Allowed Values: N = No the first mortgage is not serviced in house; Y = Yes, the first mortgage is serviced in house.

Detailed Description: Settlement Negotiated Amount - Report the settlement amount (portion of outstanding UPB) agreed to be paid by the customer. Populate for loans/lines where "Settlement" is selected under Workout Type Completed.

Credit Line Frozen Flag - Report whether the line of credit is frozen in the reporting month. Identifies any line in its draw period temporarily frozen, allowing no further draws. Continue coding "Y" each month until paid in full or reinstated. Leave blank for home equity loans. Note: Frozen is temporary and distinct from closed.
Allowed Values: N = No the line of credit was not frozen; Y = Yes the line of credit was frozen in the reporting month

Detailed Description: Locked Amount - Amortizing - LOC - Report the amount of credit line that has been locked and is now amortizing. For lines of credit, populate with the total dollar amount locked and amortizing under independent loan terms. Leave blank for home equity loans and lines without lockout feature. If lockout feature exists but no balance locked, report zero.

Locked Amount - Interest Only - LOC - Report the amount of credit line that has been locked (Interest Only). For lines of credit, populate with the total dollar amount locked as interest only under independent terms. Leave blank for home equity loans and lines without lockout feature. If lockout feature exists but no balance locked, report zero.
Retired March 2020
Actual Payment Amount - Report the actual dollar amount of the principal and interest payment received in the reporting month. Do not include fee payments.

Lockout Feature Flag - Report whether the line of credit has a lock-out feature whereby a portion of outstanding principal balance may be locked into an amortizing or interest only loan with separate terms. Leave blank for home equity loans. For HELOCs, only use "Y" or "N".

Credit Line Closed Flag - Report any line of credit in its draw period that has been closed, allowing no further draws or increase in principal balance. Status should remain until paid in full. Leave blank for home equity loans. Note: A closed line means the borrower will never regain use of the draw.
Retired September 2022

Term modification - Report whether the loan has been through a term modification (change to rate reset date, balloon feature and/or maturity date). Code "Y" if changed through modification; otherwise "N". None of the records should be left blank.

Principal Write-down - Report all loans where an adjustment to the unpaid principal balance has occurred through modification. Code "Y" if adjustment occurred; otherwise "N". Only for loans that have undergone reduction in principal due to modification or loss mitigation. Should only be populated for loans also identified as modifications.

Report whether the line of credit has been re-aged (delinquency status changed by collections/customer service as loss mitigation) but not formally modified. Code "Y" for re-aged lines not in active loss mitigation. Code "N" for modified but not re-aged. Leave blank if neither modified/re-aged, or if this is a loan. Should carry forward from month to month. Do not count holiday extensions.
Allowed Values: N = No; Y = Yes; If record is loan please leave blank

Detailed Description: Report whether the home equity loan has been extended but terms not formally modified. Code "Y" for extended loans not in active loss mitigation. Loans in loss mitigation where amortization term is being changed should be captured under Modification. Leave blank for lines.
Allowed Values: N = No; Y = Yes; If record is line please leave blank
